description_long: This is a rugged, rectangular military-style toolbox constructed from weathered green metal panels reinforced with dark brown wooden or metal slats along the edges and top. The surface is heavily worn, showing scratches, rust, and discoloration, suggesting extensive outdoor or field use. Prominent white stenciled markings are visible on the lid, including the words 'Military Property' and a circular emblem, as well as triangular warning symbols on the sides. The box is secured with visible bolts at the corners, and the lid appears to be tightly fitted, possibly with a hidden hinge or latch mechanism. The overall build is robust, designed to protect tools or equipment in harsh environments. The box is low and wide, with no visible handles or external compartments.
description: A weathered, military-green metal toolbox with reinforced edges, white stenciled markings, and a rugged, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: The end view shows the reinforced edge with bolts and a triangular warning symbol, with the lid's stenciled markings partially visible.
description_view_1: The top view highlights the full extent of the white stenciled emblem and 'Military Property' text, as well as the reinforced slats running lengthwise.
description_view_2: The opposite end view mirrors view 0 but without the warning symbol, showing the same reinforced construction and weathered surface.
description_view_3: The front view displays the main stenciled text 'Military Property' and emblem, with reinforced slats and bolts clearly visible.
attribute_handle_type: No visible handles; likely carried by gripping the reinforced edges.
attribute_latch_mechanism: No visible external latch or locking mechanism; lid appears to be secured by internal or hidden means.
attribute_brand_logo: No brand logo; military emblem and stenciled text are present on the lid.
attribute_compartment_configuration: No internal compartments or trays are visible; the box appears to be a single large compartment with a fitted lid.
attribute_external_labeling: 'Military Property' stenciled in white on the lid
White circular emblem on the lid
White triangular warning symbol on one end
